opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I slipped with the chef's knife, and it sliced right open; I can see the yellow fat inside and it won't stop bleeding!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Deep cut on the forearm from a kitchen knife about 45 minutes ago that keeps oozing blood even with a towel pressed on it.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 45 minutes ago while chopping heavy vegetables when the knife slipped
symptom_narrative.character: a deep cut that gapes open at the inner forearm; I can see yellowish fatty tissue inside and it keeps oozing dark blood
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very painful at the cut, and I'm anxious because it won't stop bleeding
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the inner side of my left forearm, between the wrist and elbow
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant ooze; slows when I press hard with the towel and starts again when I peek
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: pressing firmly with a folded tea towel slows the bleeding
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: letting go of the pressure or moving the arm
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I can still move all my fingers normally and the hand feels normal, not numb
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never cut myself this badly before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: holding a blood-soaked towel against the arm, can't use the hand while pressing

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: none regular; not on any blood thinners

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: was preparing food at home; spouse is present and helping hold pressure

objective_data_offered.value: a roughly 6 cm straight cut on the inner left forearm that gapes wide open at rest with yellow fatty tissue visible inside; dark blood oozing steadily, no obvious spurting
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held phone camera, variable lighting and focus; depth and deep structures cannot be assessed on video

objective_data_offered.value: slow steady dark ooze that slows with firm pressure; not bright-red or pulsing/squirting in time with the heartbeat
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's lay description of the bleeding character

objective_data_offered.value: can bend and straighten all fingers and the wrist normally, and says the hand and fingers feel normal with no numbness or pins-and-needles
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported gross movement and sensation only; not a formal tendon or two-point discrimination examination
